qa_pairs.question: What are the specifications for the H100-2g.20gb and H100-3g.40gb Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles?
qa_pairs.answer: The H100-2g.20gb profile offers 2/8th of the computing power with 20GB of GPU memory, while the H100-3g.40gb profile provides 3/8th of the computing power with 40GB of GPU memory.

qa_pairs.question: What is the benefit of using less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles?
qa_pairs.answer: Using less powerful Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles will have a lower impact on your allocation and priority.

qa_pairs.question: How can one list all the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles and full GPU names on a specific cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To list all the available Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) profiles and full GPU names on a given cluster, one can run the command `sinfo -o "%G"|grep gpu|sed 's/gpu://g'|sed 's/),/\n/g'|cut -d: -f1|sort|uniq`.
